parameters.jsCode:
// Logging record structure.
// Replace with CSV append, Google Sheets, Data Store, or SQLite write nodes.
return [{
  runId: $json.runId,
  date: new Date().toISOString(),
  company: $json.job.company,
  role: $json.job.role,
  location: $json.job.location,
  jobUrl: $json.job.url,
  source: $json.job.source,
  matchScore: $json.matchScore,
  status: $json.applicationStatus || 'Applied',
  reason: 'Meets threshold and passed filters',
  resumeVersion: $json.tailoredResumePath || '',
  coverLetterVersion: $json.coverLetterPath || '',
  notes: 'Replace this node with real output/AppliedJobs.csv append.'
}];

// Skipped branch log.
return [{
  runId: $json.runId,
  date: new Date().toISOString(),
  company: $json.job.company,
  role: $json.job.role,
  location: $json.job.location,
  jobUrl: $json.job.url,
  source: $json.job.source,
  matchScore: $json.matchScore,
  status: 'Skipped',
  reason: `Below threshold ${$json.threshold}`,
  notes: 'No apply action taken.'
}];
